aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Driven clarity

💼 Career: Tum focused effort se ek important breakthrough la sakte ho

❤️ Love: Direct baat se misunderstanding clear hogi

💰 Money: Calculated कदम फायदा देगा

🧘 Advice: Intent clear rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum jab clear hote ho, sab align ho jata hai
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Comfort zone pull

💼 Career: Change resist karoge toh growth slow hogi

❤️ Love: Routine boring feel ho sakta hai

💰 Money: Safe but stagnant flow

🧘 Advice: Thoda adapt karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum stability ke chakkar me growth miss kar dete ho
